posts.title: Botober 2025: Terrible recipes from a tiny neural net
posts.summary: After seeing generated text evolve from the days of tiny neural networks to today's ChatGPT-style large language models, I have to conclude: there's something special about the tiny guys. Maybe it's the way the tiny neural networks string together text letter by letter just
posts.author: Janelle Shane
